title: Integrated Consulting Ecosystem
subtitle: From macro to micro, data-driven wholistic strategies.
hero_intro: KVKK compliance, operational efficiency and digital transformation — all disciplines, founder-led every engagement.

roi_calculator.title: Calculate Your Potential
roi_calculator.desc: See the value of digital transformation today.

booking.title: Start Your Project
booking.desc: Define your needs and contact our experts.

strategic-transformation.title: Strategic Transformation & Corporate Planning
strategic-transformation.subtitle: 3-5 year north star + 90-day implementation bridge in uncertainty.
strategic-transformation.valueProp: Closes the gap between vision and daily operations — board decisions actually land in the field.

mergers-acquisitions.title: Mergers, Acquisitions (M&A) & Valuation
mergers-acquisitions.subtitle: Valuation, due diligence, post-merger integration (PMI), exit strategy.
mergers-acquisitions.valueProp: Objective advisory from strategic fit to PMI; valuation anchored on sectoral comparables.

family-business.title: Family Business Governance & Constitution
family-business.subtitle: Generational transition, institutionalization, sustainable family constitution.
family-business.valueProp: We co-design governance that preserves family value while scaling the company.

operational-excellence.title: Operational Excellence & Supply Chain
operational-excellence.subtitle: Lean manufacturing, Six Sigma, end-to-end logistics optimization.
operational-excellence.valueProp: OEE/cycle time/lead time improvements typically 15-40% in 12 months.

neuromarketing.title: Neuromarketing & Customer Experience (CX)
neuromarketing.subtitle: Behavioral consumer analysis with data-driven brand strategy.
neuromarketing.valueProp: Goes beyond 'what consumers say' to 'what they do and feel' — measurable conversion uplift.

hr-transformation.title: Human Resources & Organization Design
hr-transformation.subtitle: Talent matrices, performance management, agile organizational structures.
hr-transformation.valueProp: Transforms HR from payroll+leave into a strategic partner with measurable talent metrics.

crisis-management.title: Crisis Management & Business Continuity
crisis-management.subtitle: Emergency action plans, resilience testing for financial or operational crises.
crisis-management.valueProp: 72-hour strategic triage + stakeholder communication + financial maneuvers.

ai-analytics.title: AI & Business Analytics
ai-analytics.subtitle: ML models for predictive analysis and AI integration strategy.
ai-analytics.valueProp: ROI-focused use-case selection beyond AI hype; pilot to scale roadmap.

digital-strategy.title: Digital Transformation & Technology Strategy
digital-strategy.subtitle: ERP selection, process automation (RPA), digital maturity analysis.
digital-strategy.valueProp: Not tool selection — alignment of strategy-process-technology-culture tetragram. Measurable ROI.

data-governance.title: Data Governance & KVKK/GDPR Compliance
data-governance.subtitle: Data privacy, cyber governance, regulatory compliance (ISO 27001).
data-governance.valueProp: Moves KVKK/GDPR beyond compliance-checklist into strategic data governance.

esg-strategy.title: ESG Strategy & Green Deal
esg-strategy.subtitle: Carbon footprint reporting, sustainability strategy, green finance access.
esg-strategy.valueProp: EU Green Deal + CBAM-ready strategic roadmap — competitive advantage, not just cost.

investment-incentives.title: Investment Incentives & Grant Management
investment-incentives.subtitle: Government support, R&D grants, project-based investment incentive certificates.
investment-incentives.valueProp: Maps your company to 200+ Turkish incentive programs; manages application + reporting.

macro-risk.title: Macroeconomic Risk & Market Analysis
macro-risk.subtitle: FX, rate, inflation projections; C-Level decision support reports.
macro-risk.valueProp: Structured answer to CFO/CEO what-if — scenario planning + hedge strategy.

competition-economics.title: Competition Economics & Regulation
competition-economics.subtitle: Antitrust review, market dominance analysis, regulatory compliance.
competition-economics.valueProp: Economic analysis for Competition Authority / EU Commission investigations + M&A filing risk.

industrial-relations.title: Industrial Relations & Unions
industrial-relations.subtitle: Collective bargaining, union relations, workplace harmony.
industrial-relations.valueProp: Structured CBA negotiation; protects employer cost envelope + workplace peace.

payroll-audit.title: Payroll Audit & Employment Incentives
payroll-audit.subtitle: Maximize SGK premium incentives, cost optimization, payroll risk audit.
payroll-audit.valueProp: Reclaims 5-15% of payroll cost via systematic incentive optimization.

employer-branding.title: Talent Management & Employer Branding
employer-branding.subtitle: Strategic Employer Branding to attract and retain qualified workforce.
employer-branding.valueProp: Reduces recruitment cost + turnover, increases employee engagement via data-driven EVP.

market-entry.title: International Market Entry & Export
market-entry.subtitle: Target market research, distributor identification, Turquality preparation.
market-entry.valueProp: Go-to-market strategy in 2-3 target markets: distributor pool + Turquality + export finance.

global-intelligence.title: Global Diplomacy & Commercial Intelligence
global-intelligence.subtitle: Geopolitical risk maps, commercial intelligence, inter-state crisis scenarios.
global-intelligence.valueProp: Monthly geopolitical briefing + risk-event simulation for cross-border companies.

smart-cities.title: Smart Cities & Public Policy
smart-cities.subtitle: Digital urbanism strategy and impact analysis for local governments.
smart-cities.valueProp: 3-5 year smart city roadmap: citizen services, mobility, energy, waste, safety architecture.

government-relations.title: Corporate Relations & Lobbying (GR)
government-relations.subtitle: Stakeholder mapping, regulatory tracking, strategic representation in Ankara and Brussels.
government-relations.valueProp: Early signals on regulation changes affecting your sector + ethical lobbying support.
